lines: Norway vs England went to extra time last night, and somehow the one cunt who benefits most is Wilmot — that lucky fucking toad had BOTH teams, meaning he watched 120 minutes of football with a raging semi regardless of the result. England nicked it 2–1 aet and Wilmot pockets points from both sides like the jammy, talent-free bastard he is. Still only joint first on 87pts though, because Callum is right there breathing down his neck and Callum's France are still very much alive and dangerous.

Al is absolutely cooked. Netherlands out, Croatia out, Norway out — all three of his knockout teams eliminated like they'd been personally offended by the concept of winning football matches. Al sits last on 46pts with Panama already long dead in the groups. That's a complete and utter sweepstake corpse. Every single one of your teams, Al. Every. Single. One. Fucking embarrassing.

Ellis had Argentina grind out a 3–1 aet win over Switzerland last night — extra time, again — and the mad thing is she's seventh on 58pts but Argentina are still breathing, which means this fuck could yet cause chaos in the top half of the table.

Butters is sat on 80pts in third watching everything burn — Portugal gone, Morocco gone, Norway gone, DR Congo gone. Every last one of your teams has been wiped off the face of the tournament. Third place with a completely empty hand. Enjoy watching.

No fixtures today, you idle wankers — use the time to process the grief, check the standings, and remember that Dene is somehow still in this purely because France keep winning despite Dene contributing absolutely nothing of value to any conversation ever.
